channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 9 Jun: Harare clear sky · high 24° / low 11°
item.description: Harare: high 24°, low 11° (clear sky) · Bulawayo: high 25°, low 12° (clear sky) · Mutare: high 22°, low 10° (clear sky) · Gweru: high 24°, low 12° (clear sky) · Masvingo: high 24°, low 8° (clear sky) · Victoria Falls: high 28°, low 10° (clear sky) Tsumo yezuva: Mbudzi kudya mufenje haina mhosva. (When a goat eats a baboon’s food, there is no crime.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
